MedTracker

Med School Tracker

Med School Tracker is a specialized productivity tool designed specifically for medical students. It helps track clinical rotations, patient encounters, procedures, and study progress. The platform provides insightful analytics to help students identify areas for improvement and celebrate milestones throughout their medical education journey.

Visit Live Site

MedTracker Interface Preview

Screenshot coming soon

Features

  • Clinical rotation tracking
  • Patient encounter logging
  • Procedure documentation
  • Study progress analytics
  • Milestone celebrations
  • Exportable reports

Tech Stack

React
Next.js
TypeScript
PostgreSQL
Tailwind CSS

Tags

MedicalProductivityEducationAnalytics
